docket_entries.description: PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION INTER-INSURANCE BUREAU AS TO RESPONDENT CHEN, YONG LIANG

MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES & REQUEST FOR PROD OF DOCS & ATTENDANCE & TESTIMONY AT DEPOSITION, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION INTER-INSURANCE BUREAU HEARING SET FOR SEP-20-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND ATTENDANCE AND TESTIMONY AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO APPEAR FOR HIS DEPOSITION ON A DATE CERTAIN TO BE NOTICED BY PETITIONER. (612/EAHEWLETT)
